{{Infobox concept
| name = Soulsmith inheritance
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulsmith]] inheritance of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is a profound legacy left by the original Patriarch of the Arelius clan, who was considered one of history's most peerless [[Soulsmiths]]. Unlike standard [[dream tablets]] that merely provide memories, this inheritance is a deep integration into an individual's identity. While absorbing multiple inheritances can lead to instability in willpower or personality, those who successfully merge with one gain immense benefits. The inheritance provides the recipient with the genius-level insights, instincts, and vast technical knowledge of [[Ozmanthus]], including his mastery of [[madra]] manipulation and centuries of experience in crafting weapons. It also carries a sense of the Patriarch's personality, often manifesting as a feeling of smug arrogance or a predictable way of thinking. One such inheritance was absorbed by the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]], granting him the skills and instincts of a master craftsman. The inheritance is located within a branch of a [[labyrinth]] and can be accessed through a shrine containing a large, cut gem.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulsmith inheritance]] was a cracked crystal that leaked dream madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] obtained [[Ozmanthus Arelius]]' [[Soulsmith inheritance]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A true [[Soulsmith inheritance]] is not a simple dream tablet.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An inheritance settles much deeper than an ordinary dream tablet.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is taunting the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
